positive: A symmetrical, central composition of a bioluminescent mystical forest scene. The style is a highly detailed blend of Art Nouveau organic curves and sharp, elegant geometric mandalas. Focus on massive, stylized fungal growths, glowing flora, and symmetrical tree silhouettes. Lighting must be dramatic, deep contrast between velvety midnight blues and vibrant neon accents (cyan, magenta, emerald green). The foreground features geometric floating glyphs and star paths. Perfect for a clean, high-contrast print on apparel. Intricate linework, digital painting, smooth gradients, high saturation.
negative: blurry, noisy, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, low quality, amateur, distorted, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, simple, flat colors, cartoon, anime
